title: A Dinner for Two
content: Grace invited Noah to dinner at her apartment. She spent the afternoon preparing homemade pasta and baking fresh bread. Noah arrived carrying a small dessert from his favorite bakery. They laughed while cooking the final dishes together and enjoyed every bite of the meal. After dinner, they washed the dishes side by side while singing old songs. It was a simple evening without expensive gifts or fancy restaurants, but both agreed it was one of their happiest dates.
